mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM product t1,brand t2,product_type t3,supply t4,place t5 WHERE t1.brand_id = t2.brand_id AND t1.type_id = t3.type_id AND t1.supply_id = t4.supply_id AND t1.place_id = t5.place_id
AND t1.store_id =#{storeId}
AND t1.product_name like concat('%',#{productName},'%')
AND t2.brand_name like concat('%',#{brandName},'%')
AND t3.type_name like concat('%',#{typeName},'%')
AND t4.supply_name like concat('%',#{supplyName},'%')
AND t5.place_name like concat('%',#{placeName},'%')
AND t1.up_down_state = #{upDownState}
AND t1.supp_date <=now()
AND t1.supp_date >=now()

SELECT t1.*,t2.brand_name brandName ,t3.type_name typeName ,t4.supply_name supplyName ,t5.place_name placeName ,t6.unit_name unitName ,t7.store_name storeName FROM product t1,brand t2,product_type t3,supply t4,place t5,unit t6,store t7 WHERE t1.brand_id = t2.brand_id AND t1.type_id = t3.type_id AND t1.supply_id = t4.supply_id AND t1.place_id = t5.place_id AND t1.unit_id = t6.unit_id AND t1.store_id = t7.store_id
AND t1.store_id =#{product.storeId}
AND t1.product_name like concat('%',#{product.productName},'%')
AND t2.brand_name like concat('%',#{product.brandName},'%')
AND t3.type_name like concat('%',#{product.typeName},'%')
AND t4.supply_name like concat('%',#{product.supplyName},'%')
AND t5.place_name like concat('%',#{product.placeName},'%')
AND t1.up_down_state = #{product.upDownState}
AND t1.supp_date <=now()
AND t1.supp_date >=now()
order by t1.create_time desc limit #{page.limitIndex},#{page.pageSize}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM product WHERE product_id in
#{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_invent = product_invent + #{param2} WHERE product_id =#{param1}
